user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Bean Burrito Bowl — Berry Boost Style
Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 7 > Lunch > Soba Noodle Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Wrap
reasoning: I selected the Burrito Bowl and the Soba Noodle Bowl as the primary targets for deletion. Bowls containing loose grains, beans, salsa, and liquid dressings are significantly harder to transport in a school lunchbox and eat cleanly compared to structured wraps or quesadillas. The Salmon Salad Wrap and Veggie Quesadilla were kept as they are self-contained, and the Teriyaki Chicken Bowl is generally more cohesive than a bean/salsa-heavy burrito bowl.
